prompt: Our .NET API started throwing 'Timeout expired. The timeout period elapsed prior to obtaining a connection from the pool.' yesterday at 3pm. EF Core, pool size 100, no traffic spike. How do I diagnose this?

assertions.text: Response includes 'Mode: Incident Analysis' or 'Incident Analysis' as a heading
assertions.name: contains-mode-label

assertions.text: Response contains BotE pool math with numbers (connections x hold_time vs pool_size)
assertions.name: contains-bote-pool-math

assertions.text: Response names a specific root cause (not just 'check your code' or generic advice)
assertions.name: identifies-root-cause

assertions.text: Response gives concrete EF Core-specific fix (e.g. AsNoTracking, using disposal, connection leak fix)
assertions.name: includes-ef-core-fix

assertions.text: Response mentions generating or creating KOS records (incident log capture)
assertions.name: mentions-kos-capture
